text:
Once upon a time in a forest filled with singing birds and drowsy bats, there lived a girl named Lily who loved to explore hollow trees. One moonlit night, while nibbling on a delicious insect she had discovered high in a branch, Lily stumbled upon something glowing inside one ancient oak.

Curiosity got the better of her, and soon she had the whole tree open, revealing a room filled with golden coins from distant lands. There were coins from Arabia, silver coins from Spain, and curious-looking gold coins from mysterious Asian nations. Lily's heart fluttered with excitement. She wondered what adventures these coins would buy her. Maybe she could buy a shiny new cloak like the ones she saw in fairy tales!

With a heart full of dreams, Lily decided to keep the treasure quiet. She'd have grand adventures with her newfound riches. Every morning, she’d hide little treasures throughout the forest, leaving behind a trail of riches for herself.

Years passed, and she became a local legend—a
